input_roles.product_reference_image: Locks product identity, silhouette, material, color, logo and packaging facts.
input_roles.scene_reference_image: Provides space, tabletop, environment light and advertising atmosphere.
input_roles.style_or_composition_reference_image: Only provides layout, color, lighting or camera language.

preserve_scope: brand logo and key packaging text
change_scope: integrate product into a unified commercial advertising visual
match light, shadow, reflection, depth of field and contact relation
make product the first visual center
critical_requirements: Product identity must come from the product image.
Scene space and atmosphere must come from the scene image.
Style reference must not copy unrelated people, watermark, props or competitors.
Background must serve the product selling point and not steal focus.
negative_constraints: do not change product identity, logo, package structure or key text
do not copy unrelated people, watermarks, clutter or competitor products
do not let background dominate the product

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create a unified e-commerce advertising visual. Product identity comes from product_reference_image; scene and atmosphere come from scene_reference_image; style_or_composition_reference_image may guide layout and lighting only. Preserve product identity and make it the first visual center. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.

review_focus: natural light, shadow and contact integration
